channel.title: Future on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Future on jamesm.blog

item.title: The Exponential Curve: Understanding Human Advancement Acceleration
item.description: Why human advancement is accelerating exponentially - from steam engines to AGI in three centuries

item.title: Four Futures for the Machine-Speed Economy
item.description: A map of four plausible futures - broad abundance, winner-take-most, techno-feudalism, and a managed transition - with the signals that suggest which one is emerging.
